description:
This application allows to manage Nitrokey 3 devices. Currently, it only allows updating the firmware of Nitrokey 3 devices. More features will be added in the future. To manage Nitrokey Pro and Nitrokey Storage devices, use the older Nitrokey App.


What's Changed
- Remove OpenSymbol font by @robin-nitrokey in #412
- Fix typo in user visible string by @iluminat23 in #413
- Update documentation by @mmerklinger in #306
- Use CCID when needed to connect to the nitrokey 3 by @sosthene-nitrokey in #398
New Contributors
- @iluminat23 made their first contribution in #413
